Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First let me understand the standard P2P process flow 1 Create Purchase Requisition 2 Approve Purchase Requisition 3 Issue Purchase Order 4 Receive Goods 5 Vendor Invoice Received 6 Match Invoice to PO 7 Release Payment 8 Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now let me examine each case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1001 Follows the correct sequence seems normal Create PR Approve PR Issue PO Receive Goods Vendor Invoice Match Invoice Release Payment Close Case

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1002 Multiple anomalies here Create PR Issue PO skips approval Vendor Invoice Release Payment Approve PR approval AFTER PO issued Receive Goods Match Invoice Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Problems Approval happens AFTER Issue PO and AFTER payment release Payment is released before goods are received Invoice is received before PO approval

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1003 Serious anomalies Create PR Approve PR Issue PO Release Payment Vendor Invoice Received Receive Goods Match Invoice Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Problems Payment released BEFORE invoice received and before goods received Invoice received AFTER payment released Goods received AFTER payment released

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1004 Anomalies Create PR Approve PR Receive Goods Issue PO Vendor Invoice Match Invoice Release Payment Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Problems Goods received BEFORE purchase order is issued This is impossible in practice you cant receive goods before ordering them

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Let me elaborate on why these are problematic
